cells.rationale: Orchestrates existing supported verbs with the sequence and fail-safe policy enumerated step-by-step in the spec; the wrapper never writes keeper.db and keeper reclaim carries its own rollback discipline, so the data-loss blast radius sits behind gates the wrapper only invokes. Substantial well-specified implementation, not an opus-gated invariant. Human-directed GPT-first reassignment.

Single-file S-sized runbook pointer with a named existing pattern to follow and the placement choice bounded to two spec-named candidates — tiny fully-specified mechanical work. Human-directed GPT-first reassignment.
